evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,2500)); try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4000)); MOS.abrirAnalitica('IDPRO0000063'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,5000)); r.grupoVisible=!document.getElementById('anGrupoSec')?.classList.contains('hidden'); r.tabs=[...document.querySelectorAll('#anGrupoSec button')].map(b=>b.textContent.trim().slice(0,20)).slice(0,4); r.textoKgSem=((document.getElementById('anGrupoSec')||{}).textContent||'').indexOf('kg/sem')>=0; return r; })()
